CREATE TABLE test_table (id INT, data CLOB);
CREATE TABLE nested_table (id INT, parent_id INT, data CLOB);
SELECT json.tojsonarray(SELECT data FROM nested_table WHERE parent_id IS NULL) FROM nested_table WHERE parent_id IS NULL;
SELECT json.tojsonarray(SELECT data FROM (SELECT * FROM nested_table WHERE parent_id IS NULL) AS parent) FROM nested_table;
CREATE TABLE second_table (ref_id INT, info CLOB);
SELECT json.tojsonarray(data) FROM (SELECT data FROM test_table UNION SELECT info FROM second_table) AS combined_data;
SELECT json.tojsonarray(data) FROM (SELECT data FROM test_table WHERE id = 1) UNION SELECT json.tojsonarray(info) FROM second_table WHERE ref_id = 1;
CREATE TABLE complex_table (a INT, b CLOB);
SELECT json.tojsonarray(b) FROM complex_table c JOIN test_table t ON c.a = t.id WHERE c.a > 0;
